canonical_extension_obstruction: for every positive child K, parent tail = raw_input + 2^(E_B+E_H)*(2^r0*K-1) > 0; recursive canonical addresses never stabilize
claim_scope: six exact finite renormalization levels by default; phase and sign-flip identities; bounded direct-branch comparison and parent-macro replay; bounded adjacent-background alphabet; no infinite hierarchy or ordinary orbit
